taxonomy: Amethystanthus lasiocarpus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to South America. Further classification places it in the genus Amethystanthus. The plant is also known by the synonym Lobelia lasiocarpa. This classification may be subject to change as new research emerges.
